title: One Minute at a Time
logline: An overwhelmed university student discovers a time-management app and turns her chaotic days into confident, well-managed ones.
visual_style: Disney/Pixar-inspired 2D vector animation: warm rounded character design, bright saturated color palette, soft shadows, expressive squash-and-stretch motion, built with SVG + React/Remotion (code-driven, no photoreal AI image generation)

protagonist.name: Maya
protagonist.design: Round friendly face, warm brown wavy hair in a bun, oversized mustard hoodie, big expressive eyes for emotion acting

product.name: TimeWise
product.logo_style: Rounded clock-leaf hybrid mark, purple-to-teal gradient, friendly and calm

music.source: Suno AI-generated song 'One Minute at a Time'

cue_sheet.lyric_excerpt: Another morning, running late / Too many dreams, too much on my plate / Missed the bus, missed another chance / Always living by circumstance
Every minute matters now / I finally learned the why and how / One small change can light the way
One decision changed it all / Now I rise instead of fall / The future starts with what I choose... / One minute at a time

scenes.caption: Maya was always one minute too late.
scenes.action: Alarm blares. Maya jolts awake, hair a mess. Books and papers are scattered everywhere. A wall clock's hands spin unnaturally fast. Maya rushes around, knocks over a coffee cup, trips over her backpack, and watches the campus bus pull away through the window. She collapses face-down on her desk, defeated.
scenes.camera: Handheld-feeling quick cuts; clock in extreme close-up; wide shot of messy room; POV shot of bus leaving through window

scenes.caption: Then she found TimeWise.
scenes.action: Maya's phone glows on the desk. She picks it up; the TimeWise app icon blooms open with a soft sparkle animation. A calendar and checklist populate themselves in friendly, rounded UI cards. Maya's expression shifts from exhausted to curious, then hopeful, as she taps her first task.
scenes.camera: Close-up on phone screen UI animating in; close-up on Maya's face lighting up; slow push-in

scenes.caption: One minute at a time, she got her life back.
scenes.action: Maya walks confidently across a sunny campus, checking off tasks on TimeWise with a smile. She arrives to class early, high-fives a friend, and sits down calm and organized. Final beat: her phone screen shows every task checked off, and the TimeWise logo settles beside the title card 'One Minute at a Time'.
scenes.camera: Wide tracking shot of confident walk; medium shot of high-five; final centered logo/title card
